groups.description: Implement scheduler input gate, ScheduledDraftReview output shape, scheduler needs_input/draft_review/infeasible_review status derivation, safe preflight defaults, inclusive date windows, basic usable capacity, and tests for those contracts.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_scheduling.py -k 'input_gate or output_shape or preflight or inclusive or capacity or default'

groups.description: Implement planning-budget cap, deterministic buffer reservation/erosion, balanced/front-loaded/light-start placement, essential-before-optional/dependency preservation, continuation sessions, fallback metadata, no active-task side effects, and risk report facts.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_scheduling.py -k 'buffer or load_shape or continuation or fallback or risk or optional or dependency or active_task'

groups.description: Implement fact-to-option mapping, deterministic option effects as review recomputation/storage/compiler-handoff results, crunch versus overload semantics, reduce-scope availability, lower-depth and answer-one-question handoffs, and hard-deadline option guardrails.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_scheduling.py -k 'option or recompute or crunch or overload or reduce_scope or lower_depth or hard_deadline or late_finish'

groups.description: Add real-context feasible resume packaging and infeasible easyagent rebuild dry-run tests, run full scheduler verification, run strict OpenSpec validation, and mark the change tasks complete.
testCommands: cd assistant_backend && uv run pytest tests/test_study_plan_scheduling.py
